description:
Build focused CodeGraph context for a task or area of the codebase. Returns markdown with relevant symbols and optional source snippets. Use before answering architecture or flow questions, or before editing unfamiliar code.
- When Headroom is enabled and output exceeds the compress threshold, large results are compressed through headroom-ai (requires headroom proxy or HEADROOM_API_KEY).

task.description: Natural-language description of what you need to understand or do

path.description: Project root directory. Defaults to the current working directory when omitted.

noCode.description: Exclude source code blocks from the output
